title: Fleet jurisdiction record
description: One JSON Lines record per locale per fleet, emitted by `list-fleet`. The contract consumed by everything downstream in fleet-monitor.

fleet.description: Fleet name: the stem of the config file the locale came from

config.description: Lineage: file name of the fleet config the record was derived from

org.description: GitHub org owning the fleet's repos

repo.description: Repo name, derived from the template's folder-name pattern

template.description: The pipeline-manager template the locale uses

base_template.description: template with any -paused suffix stripped: the locale's durable identity, stable across session pauses

paused.description: True when the template name ends in -paused (out-of-session)

runner.description: GitHub Actions runner for the locale, default ubuntu-latest

expected_workflows.description: Workflow file names the template ships, minus disabled_jobs, as they exist in rendered repos (.j2 stripped)
